name: phalanx-php/panoply
description: Agent abstraction for PHP 8.4+: contracts, provider/transport adapters, conversation parsers, vendor HomeDirs

suggest.phalanx-php/aegis: Required for the Aegis Runtime adapter; enables scope-bound cancellation and cleanup
suggest.phalanx-php/athena: Required for the Athena Provider adapter; bridges Athena's AgentEvent stream to panoply Cues
suggest.phalanx-php/iris: Required for the Iris Transport adapter; OpenSwoole-native streaming HTTP
suggest.phalanx-php/grammata: Required for HomeDir parsers; managed file I/O with FilePool
suggest.phalanx-php/archon: Required for the panoply:agents:scan Archon command
suggest.ext-sqlite3: Required for Codex HomeDir sqlite-backed history
suggest.ext-openswoole: Required for the Iris transport and Aegis runtime
suggest.php-collective/toml: Required for reading Codex config.toml settings; without it Settings operates in no-op mode and asString/asInt/etc. throw
